Manufacturer's Representative

Leading New England's plumbing, heating, and HVAC trades

MRA Limited connects top-tier manufacturers with regional wholesalers and contractors. Expert representation. Local expertise. Responsive service.

Training & Support
What We Do

Complete manufacturer representation

MRA handles everything a manufacturer needs to succeed in New England wholesaling.

01 Product Representation

We represent 25+ leading manufacturers across plumbing, heating, HVAC, and engineered products. We know every product, every application, every territory.

02 Sales & Business Development

Our experienced team — Jon Mitchell, Tom Rayko, Zach Pona, Dana Lemire, Benjamin Whitaker — drives sales, opens accounts, and builds market share across New England.

03 Training & Support

We train wholesalers and contractors on product features, applications, and best practices. Education builds trust and moves product.

04 Territory Management

Each territory (RI, CT, MA, VT, NH, ME, NY) has dedicated sales coverage and support. Local presence, responsive service.

05 Market Development

We identify new market opportunities, launch new products, and help manufacturers expand in the New England region.

06 Problem Solving

When issues arise — pricing, availability, technical support — we solve them fast. We're the bridge between manufacturer and wholesaler.

Commitment to service
Why wholesalers work with us

The MRA advantage

"

MRA knows this market inside and out. They don't just sell products — they build relationships and solve problems. Responsive, professional, consistent.

WH

Industry Partner

Regional Wholesaler, New England

"

The training MRA provides our team is exceptional. Their salespeople understand our business and our customers. That knowledge transfers directly to the field.

DM

Distribution Manager

Wholesale Supply, New England

"

When we needed technical support or special solutions, MRA was there. They're not just taking orders — they're invested in making us successful.

OW

Owner

HVAC Contractor, Massachusetts

Ready to work with a manufacturer's representative that delivers?

Let's build something together

MRA brings top brands and real expertise to New England wholesaling. Contact us to discuss how we can support your business.
